mechanism: Covenant-lite structures remove maintenance covenant triggers while EBITDA addbacks inflate reported earnings in CLO compliance tests. Together they create dual layers of delayed recognition: no covenant trip AND inflated metric, producing false solvency signals that persist 2-4 quarters longer than in covenanted structures.
regime_dependence: Most dangerous in post-2018 issuance (covenant quality scores near historical lows); less relevant for legacy covenanted loans
